parameter_description: Kills all sound on all layers including delay and reverb
Releases notes on this layer; envelope release, delay and reverb continue

notes: Manual lists NRPN 158 twice - also assigned to Pitch envelope release curve
Manual lists NRPN 159 twice - also assigned to Pitch envelope invert
Manual lists NRPN 161 twice - also assigned to Filter envelope attack curve
Inverse mapping per manual: 64 = one octave down, 32 = two octaves down

parameter_description: Amplitude modulation frequency relative to grain size
Grain rate or density depending on grain ratio mode

notes: In spectral mode, max value represents full FFT block size

usage: 0: Up; 1: Down; 2: Up-down; 3: Down-up; 4: Random; 5: Shuffle; 6: Forward; 7: Reverse; 8: Forward-reverse; 9: Reverse-forward
0: Same pitch for each grain in the voice; 1: New pitch per grain

parameter_description: Value is ignored; acts as a toggle

usage: 0: LPF only; 1: LPF and HPF; 2: HPF
